pages.title: TPS Impact
pages.text: $(bold)Before FPSCompress$() (factory in loaded CM): $(li)CM chunks stay loaded (6x6 chunks = 36 chunks) $(li)All machines tick every frame $(li)Entities move, hoppers check neighbors, etc. $(li)TPS impact: Significant (depends on factory complexity)$(br2)$(bold)After FPSCompress$() (factory in CACHED mode): $(li)CM chunks unloaded (0 chunks loaded) $(li)PreFab runs simple math each tick $(li)No machine ticks, no entity updates $(li)TPS impact: Minimal (just the PreFab math)$(br2)$(bold)Typical improvement$(): 10-20 TPS gain per complex factory (your mileage may vary)

pages.title: When to Use PreFabs
pages.text: $(bold)Good use cases$(): $(li)Large automated factories (many machines) $(li)Always-on production (ore processing, item crafting) $(li)Server-friendly automation (reduce chunk loading)$(br2)$(bold)Not ideal for$(): $(li)Single machines (overhead not worth it) $(li)Farms with entity spawning (can't simulate mob drops accurately) $(li)Multi-Purpose Machines (once cached, only 1 "recipe" is used)
